notes_md:
**Giang hồ** means the criminal underworld — gangs, mafia-type networks, organized crime. It suggests a rough, dangerous world outside normal society.

It’s an uncountable noun: *giới giang hồ* (the underworld), *dân giang hồ* (people in the underworld). You don’t use classifiers with it.

It can also describe someone’s vibe: *giang hồ* = tough, street-smart, a bit gangster-like (slangy tone).

Strong memory link: *xã hội đen* = black society (very close meaning, more directly “mafia”).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He used to live in the underworld before starting his life over.
Many people say that the underworld is very dangerous and complicated.
This movie is about the lives of people in the underworld.
exampleSentences: Anh ấy từng sống trong giang hồ trước khi bắt đầu lại cuộc đời.
Nhiều người kể rằng giang hồ rất nguy hiểm và phức tạp.
Bộ phim này kể về cuộc sống của những người trong giang hồ.
notes:
Giang hồ means the criminal underworld — gangs, mafia-type networks, organized crime. It suggests a rough, dangerous world outside normal society.

It’s an uncountable noun: giới giang hồ (the underworld), dân giang hồ (people in the underworld). You don’t use classifiers with it.

It can also describe someone’s vibe: giang hồ = tough, street-smart, a bit gangster-like (slangy tone).

Strong memory link: xã hội đen = black society (very close meaning, more directly “mafia”).

definitions.vi: Giới xã hội đen, những người sống ngoài vòng pháp luật.
definitions.en: Underworld; wanderers; street-smart people often outside the law.

example.vi: Anh ta có vẻ ngoài rất giang hồ.
example.en: He has a very gangster-like appearance.
example.es: Tiene una apariencia muy de bajos fondos.

content.sentence: Những chuyện trong giới ___ rất phức tạp.

translation.en: Matters in the underworld are very complicated.
